title: stachys assoana
intro: Stachys assoana, also known as Mexican betony, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is prized for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, as well as to reduce pain and promote relaxation. Stachys assoana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs for a soothing and calming effect.
